ogTitle: Upper Tenthill vs Upper Warrego: Climate Safety

heading: Upper Tenthill vs Upper Warrego — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Upper Tenthill, Queensland and Upper Warrego, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Upper Warrego has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Upper Tenthill (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Upper Tenthill or Upper Warrego safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Upper Tenthill has a flood risk score of 42/100, while Upper Warrego scores 60/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Upper Tenthill scores 54/100 for bushfire risk. Upper Warrego scores 20/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Upper Tenthill or Upper Warrego?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Upper Warrego has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.48% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
